Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.natives
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.natives.internal.util

Class OperatingSystem.Version

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.natives.internal.util.OperatingSystem.Version
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<OperatingSystem.Version>
Enclosing class:
OperatingSystem
public static final class OperatingSystem.Version extends Object implements Comparable<OperatingSystem.Version>
The version number of an operating system.

    Field

    final int
    revision
    The hotfix version number.

  • Field Details

    • revision

      public final int revision
      The hotfix version number. See Stackoverflow for more details.

  • Constructor Details

    • Version

      public Version(int major)
      Parameters:
      major - the major component of the version number
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if major is negative

    • Version

      public Version(int major, int minor)
      Parameters:
      major - the major component of the version number
      minor - the minor component of the version number
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any of the components are negative

    • Version

      public Version(int major, int minor, int build)
      Parameters:
      major - the major component of the version number
      minor - the minor component of the version number
      build - the build component of the version number
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any of the components are negative

    • Version

      public Version(int major, Integer minor, Integer build, Integer revision)
      Parameters:
      major - the major component of the version number
      minor - the minor component of the version number
      build - the build component of the version number
      revision - the revision component of the version number
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any of the components are negative

  • Method Details

    • detected

      public static OperatingSystem.Version detected()
      Returns:
      the version of the detected operating system

    • parseWindowsVersion

      public static OperatingSystem.Version parseWindowsVersion(String versionAsString)
      Parameters:
      versionAsString - the output of the "ver" command
      Returns:
      the version
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the version is not supported

    • parseVersion

      public static OperatingSystem.Version parseVersion(String versionAsString)
      Parameters:
      versionAsString - the String representation of the version number
      Returns:
      the version of the operating system
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the version is not supported

    • compareTo

      public int compareTo(OperatingSystem.Version other)
      Specified by:
      compareTo in interface Comparable<OperatingSystem.Version>
